debug.dashboard.capture_frame.detail: Capture the current frame execution plan and bound render state.
debug.dashboard.capture.stages.detail: Stage count in the latest frame capture.
debug.dashboard.test.toggle.detail: Boolean test setting used to verify toggle rendering and runtime metric updates.
debug.dashboard.test.slider.detail: Floating-point test setting for slider rendering and value formatting.
debug.dashboard.test.number.detail: Integer test setting for compact number input rendering.
debug.dashboard.test.disable_gl_async_gp: For OpenGL backends, execute async GPU compute/upload/offscreen graphics work on the caller thread instead of shared worker contexts.
debug.dashboard.test.macro_bool.detail: Editable boolean macro test. Toggles SKETCH_TEST_BOOL.
debug.dashboard.test.macro_value.detail: Editable numeric macro test. Writes SKETCH_TEST_SCALE.
debug.dashboard.test.macro_choice.detail: Editable choice macro test. Enables exactly one PBR selection macro.
debug.dashboard.test.constant_int.detail: Module-owned constant macro value used to verify constant display.
debug.dashboard.test.constant_flag.detai: Module-owned constant macro flag used to verify constant display.
debug.dashboard.memory.total_live.detail: Current live bytes tracked across all registered memory domains.
debug.dashboard.memory.total_peak.detail: Highest observed live bytes across all tracked memory domains.
debug.dashboard.memory.alloc_rate.detail: Recent reserved-byte growth rate across tracked memory leases.
debug.dashboard.memory.free_rate.detail: Recent reserved-byte shrink rate across tracked memory leases.
debug.dashboard.memory.budget_usage.deta: Reserved bytes compared against the configured debug budget.
debug.dashboard.memory.fragmentation.det: Highest weighted fragmentation ratio reported by tracked arena-style domains.
debug.dashboard.memory.domain.detail: Domain-level memory usage, budget pressure and fragmentation.
sketch_render.detail.cull_entity: Cull entities that are not visible.
sketch_render.detail.cull_block_entity: Cull block entities that are not visible.
sketch_render.detail.cull_chunk: Cull chunks that are not visible.
sketch_render.detail.culling_precision: The precision level of culling checks. Higher values give more accurate culling but require stronger GPU performance. GPUs with better performance can raise this value appropriately.
sketch_render.detail.check_texture: For testing. When the monitoring panel is enabled, you can check whether the depth texture and culling texture are working properly.
sketch_render.detail.debug: For testing. Only effective in vanilla, used to view culled chunks.
sketch_render.detail.auto_shader_async: On some devices, using shaders and async chunk building together may cause crashes. This option will automatically disable async chunk building when shaders are enabled.
